rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: New DNS ServerLevelPluginDll Installed Via Dnscmd.EXE

rules.rule_text:
title: New DNS ServerLevelPluginDll Installed Via Dnscmd.EXE
id: f63b56ee-3f79-4b8a-97fb-5c48007e8573
related:
- id: e61e8a88-59a9-451c-874e-70fcc9740d67
  type: derived
- id: cbe51394-cd93-4473-b555-edf0144952d9
  type: derived
status: test
description: Detects the installation of a DNS plugin DLL via ServerLevelPluginDll
  parameter in registry, which can be used to execute code in context of the DNS server
  (restart required)
references:
- https://medium.com/@esnesenon/feature-not-bug-dnsadmin-to-dc-compromise-in-one-line-a0f779b8dc83
- https://blog.3or.de/hunting-dns-server-level-plugin-dll-injection.html
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2017-05-08
modified: 2023-02-05
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1574.001
- attack.t1112
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \dnscmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - /config
    - /serverlevelplugindll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
